description: Composition Green and white printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a round slit neck with a yoke and net design, short puff sleeves, ethnic print, short placket, empire waist with a pleated front and a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron do not iron on decorations This elegant kurta from vishudh speaks volumes of your class and exudes femininity with its timeless design and cut. The traditional print and net design is sure to make this a wardrobe favourite. Pair it with leggings and skinny jeans. Model statistics The model wears size M in kurtas Height: 5'7" Chest: 33" Waist: 25"
